Nightfall  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 16
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 9
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +5 HP: +25
Effect: Dooming Darkness (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 16
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 9
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +5 HP: +25
Effect: Dooming Darkness (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Nightfall, Dagger of Darkness
Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-17 00:49:17
Page Updated:Tue Oct 27th, 2020

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 56
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Nexona

▲ Page top
solo'in
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2003 at 11:01 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759801853
219 posts
My brothers 60th Rogue solos out in The Grey with this baby, uses it in primary till it lands (very easy with primal usually on) then switches to Ragebringer quickly after hitting the Fear Skill he gets. (instill doubt or somthing down that line).

Grand weapon for soloing. With this method, fungi, and mainly full tov. He doesnt usually have alot of down time, but there are those times when he gets unlucky and the skill doesnt always work.
▲ Page top
Ragebringer
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 3:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763349237
19 posts
Can she fit in the range slot?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 14 2001 at 9:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) the guy wanted the proc....
hmph
QuoteReply
# May 30 2001 at 9:17 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248767335
3 posts
Average.

I would not use this, in place of a Ragebringer. Simply put. I know the speed demon rogues will say again and again, that they produce more damage, and may be correct, but to loose 6 pts on a primary and 40percent haste. Nah, not me.

I mention it because it's ridiculous to even seek after this thing. I think this might be a nice drop for a rogue that got dragged along into Veeshan's, but seriosly, If you are high enough to live in Veeshan's, you have far better weapons with far less pain to obtain.
▲ Page top
RE: hmph
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2002 at 12:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1633306622282
429 posts
rogue epic is better then this by far in main, way more bs damage, but i see this as a mean offhander.Btw if you have a fast wep in offhand it will not be slower because of a higher delay wep in prim, and a offhand is not dependent on primary to attack past a certain lv. just get a warrior with somthing like a wurmy in first and bloodpoint in second, easy to tell between piercing and slashing.
▲ Page top
RE: hmph
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 9:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361444191
16 posts
While I have to agree that this most likely won't find it's way into a permanent position in the hands of any rogue who is spending time in Veeshan's Peak. It IS a VERY nice utility weapon imho, the effect slows running speed down more than the druid spell ensnare does (and adds in some damage), and makes for a nice soloing weapon especially if you have trained up instill doubt. So basically it's not awesome ... but very nice in the right circumstances

Oh and there's no need to lose the 40% haste from Ragebringer to wield this in the mainhand ... Ragebringer fits in the offhand as well ;) in fact mine has been there for quite a while now!

Gaef WynnZ
60 Rogue
▲ Page top
RE: hmph
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2003 at 5:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770921746
53 posts
Well, sorry for the buble burst. But you dont loose haste when RB is in secondary

Though i would not pull this succer out durring most occasions, butm if needs vbe, i would pop her out to snare. reality is, you only loose a lil DPS with this demon, plus she procs like a banshy with 16 delay and Focus i proc quite a but major agro, and the dot hurts evade lots. But when you cant find someone to snare, this sucker cuts it, its also good for solo. With the DN slow dagger and this. and worn haste ( i have SBoS ) you can immagine how easy it iw with a mob 35% slowed and dot/snared
▲ Page top
RE: hmph
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2003 at 12:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592259475172
1 post
Just want to let you know that with the 40% haste on the RB in Secondary.. the RB stays a 15/15 while this little bugger becomes a 9.6 delay beast! You clearly dont want this in your Primary though, the damage is not nearly high enough. If I were to use anything, I'd stick RB in Secondary and http://www.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=17759 in Primary... it becomes 12 Delay and 18 Damage with the 40% haste... that's pretty darn wicked if u ask me!
▲ Page top
RE: hmph
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2002 at 8:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361911386
20 posts
In some situations yeah... such as soloing in a zone where mobs flee, would be a great weapon to use instead of having to use, for example, a Serrated Bone Dirk, to make sure they're snared. Also if Instill doubt works and they're snared its going to be one quick fight =)

In a raid or exp group this would be bad though - Dooming Darkness is a nasty taunt, which is the last thing a rogue wants to do =)

Drakonn Wraithwind
Grave Lord of Innrouuk

# May 21 2001 at 11:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754315900
5 posts
welll, whomever says a weapon is fake is 1. either jelous cause they will never get the weapon or 2. think they are a badass or somethin(remember eq is a game, nothing really impressive just somethin to kill time although its cool to see uber stuff), this weapon is prolly real and no its mostl likely real and whomever thinks its fake is going to have to realize, if THIS is fake then the ragebringer effect seething fury doesmy make the wpn a 15/15 damg delay cause it does.... my friend beats my *** with that weird weapon all the time and remeber if you think is is to fast the bixie warblade was 2/6 before they nerfed it and THAT is real..so think before you speak and to all my rogues out there keep chillin yo
▲ Page top
RE: sigh....
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 11:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763501175
Scholar
71 posts
With 40% haste(what the ragebringer has) the delay on the ragebringer is 18, Since the haste is item haste when the ragebringer is equiped it will always have 18 delay unless you have spell haste buffs or something.
▲ Page top
Proc
QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 7:35 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anyone know when this procs or what the dam/effect is?
▲ Page top
RE: Proc
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 9:04 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361444191
16 posts
The effect Dooming Darkness is roughly a 65% movement slow (snare) and 300pt damage DoT which lasts roughly 90 seconds

I was 60 when I got my Nightfall so I'm afraid I can't help you with the proc level however

Gaef Wynnz
60 Rogue

my name is Tarrus Freefinger 59 rog on veeshaun the stats are right i weild one in off hand and sometimes im primary cuz procs owns. # Apr 17 2001 at 8:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757967631
18 posts
idiots that dont have a chance at ever earning something good make stuff up and say "FAKE" everytime ANYTHING new is posted. specially this idiot who thinks the jade mace is dly of 17...what a doink. and no GM had a private conversation about this stuff with the guy...go ahead ask a GM, they arnt allowed to discuss game functions or answer any gameplay questions regarding items or spells. idiot.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 16 2001 at 12:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is indeed fake. that least delayed weapons in the game(i.e. tombcarver,locustlure,jade mace and such) only have a delay of 17. i asked a gm and they said that they would never again make a weapon faster than those. they learned their lesson when they made the MCT it ahd a delay of 10. this is fake. ppl make stuff up and say they came from VP or PoM because it will be a long time before ppl go there and get a complete eqipment list.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 28 2001 at 8:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i do believe indeed that this is fake. i will ask a gm when i am on but i do think that this is fake as hell.
